elements.text: The morning light in the Scarred Gorge is choked by a suffocating, black pressure. Undulating tendrils of corrupted energy lash against the stone walls. Lyra is driven to one knee, her sword trembling as she holds up a faltering barrier of pure qi.
My barrier... it's fracturing. There is no rhythm to its strikes, no honor in its form. I can't find an opening!
elements.expression: gasping, straining against the crushing weight

elements.text: Kaelen stands behind her, his eyes darting across the swirling black currents. His fingers twitch as he runs calculations in his head, his face pale.
It is a closed loop of infinite kinetic conversion. Every traditional strike we offer is simply absorbed and redirected back at us. Our survival probability in this gorge is rapidly approaching zero.
elements.expression: coldly analytical, yet with a rare undercurrent of panic

elements.text: Master Valerius steps past them. His heavy iron armor groans under the atmospheric pressure, but his posture is unyielding. He looks at Kaelen with deep, ancient sorrow.
Because you are calculating the strength of the tide, Kaelen, not the nature of the vessel. Every power has its price. To hollow oneself out for this corruption... it leaves a void.

Valerius closes his eyes. A blinding, golden fire begins to seep from the seams of his armor, igniting his meridians from the inside out. The air around him combusts as he forces his life-force to its absolute limit.
Master, stop! You are burning your soul-core! We can retreat, we can find another way!

There is no retreat from this agent, child. Kaelen, memorize this. The entity does not generate the corruption; it channels it. The anchor point is beneath its left collarbone, where the physical heart was torn away. You must strike it precisely when the tide of shadow ebbs to draw more power.
elements.expression: authoritative, speaking through the agonizing heat of his own burning qi

elements.text: Valerius roars, launching himself directly into the heart of the black vortex. His golden light clashes violently with the darkness, creating a temporary, blinding sanctuary. The corruption begins to dissolve his armor, devouring his flesh in real time.
Live... and pay the price, Architect. Do not let this cost be in vain.

A deafening detonation of spiritual light shatters the gorge. The shockwave flings Lyra backward into the dust. The golden aura is snuffed out completely, leaving only drifting ash where Valerius stood. Kaelen stands motionless, his eyes wide, his perfect memory instantly locking onto the exact coordinates and timing of the agent's hidden weakness.
